rationale: The cited article develops a consumer decision mind-set mechanism (deliberative-to-implemental shift) with experimental evidence, and the citing article is likewise built around situationally triggered mind-sets as drivers of consumer judgments. In the citing note, the authors explicitly frame a gap around ignored situational factors, so this citation could plausibly serve as a theory/mechanism source rather than a perfunctory mention; the match is also an exact DOI link (10.1509/jmkr.44.3.370).
